name: job-hunt-copilot
description: A self-driving job-search assistant for Cowork. Run the setup skill once: it interviews you, builds your Master Career Profile from your CV, picks the right job boards for your country, and schedules a 5-agent team (find roles, tailor CVs, benchmark your profile, watch your inbox, keep your job-site profiles in sync) feeding ONE pinned dashboard. Its Today tab is your Daily Hub: tap ▶ Run now to start any helper early, and Apply/Not-interested on jobs + Accept/Reject on CV upgrades — each tap drops one line you paste into the chat and the assistant does it. Progress, profile and team detail live on the other tabs; a daily refresh keeps it current. Fully generic — any profession, any country. You always stay in control: it never submits, sends, spends, or logs in for you.
